description: Train your focus, memory and math skills. Train your brain with fun mini games that challenge your memory, focus, logic and math skills. Braincup offers 15 brain training exercises designed to sharpen your mind and improve concentration. Mental calculation: Follow the mathematical expressions. Use the result as the base for the next calculation. Chain calculation: Solve complex formulas step by step. Sherlock calculation: Find a formula to reach the goal using only the given numbers and operators. Fraction calculation: Solve the fractions. Value comparison: Select the expression with the highest value. Anomaly puzzle: Find the figure that stands out. Consider both the color and shape of each figure. Pattern sequence: Find the next figure in the pattern by looking for repeating shapes, colors and rotations. Path finder: Start at the marked position and follow the arrow instructions to find the destination. Grid solver: Fill in the missing numbers so that each row and column sums to the given totals. Visual memory: Memorize the shapes on the grid, then identify the hidden shape after the timer ends. Ghost grid: Watch the tiles light up one by one, then tap them back in the same order. Color confusion: Tap all cells where the word matches its font color. Stay focused! Colored shapes: Add up the points from the correct statements. Orbit tracker: Watch the highlighted balls, then track them as they move. Select the original targets after they stop. Flash crowd: Dots flash briefly on each side. Tap the side that had more dots. Trust your instinct! The game has several achievements and each exercise has medals to keep you motivated. No tracking. Open source.
